/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/crash_analyzer.dir/analyzer/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crash_analyzer.dir/analyzer/src/CoreAnalyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crash_analyzer.dir/analyzer/src/CSVExporter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crash_analyzer.dir/analyzer/src/DatabaseManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crash_analyzer.dir/analyzer/src/PatternMatcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crash_analyzer.dir/analyzer/src/MLAnalyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crash_analyzer.dir/analyzer/src/SolutionProposer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crash_analyzer.dir/analyzer/src/CoreFileParser.cpp.o -o bin/crash_analyzer  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so -lstdc++fs
